# neon_branch_data_api (Data Source)

Retrieves information about a Neon branch Data API.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "neon_branch_data_api" "example" {
  project_id    = "your-project-id"
  branch_id     = "your-branch-id"
  database_name = "your-database-name"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `branch_id` (String) The Neon branch ID.
- `database_name` (String) The database name.
- `project_id` (String) The Neon project ID.

### Read-Only

- `status` (String) The status of the Data API.
- `url` (String) The Data API URL.
